arts.ttl: Paris St Germain clinch title while Real Madrid slip leaves Barcelona four clear
arts.sum: Second-placed Monaco lost at Brest to leave PSG an unassailable 24 points clear in Ligue 1.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ‘motivated and excited’ for Paris St Germain clash – Unai Emery
arts.sum: Villa head to the French capital on the back of seven straight wins.

arts.ttl: Villa's Emery relishing Premier League and PSG tests
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery prioritises a top-four finish in the Premier League after the 2-1 win over Nottingham Forest, as he also looks ahead to a midweek meeting with Paris St-Germain.

arts.ttl: A closer look at how PSG won the French title without losing a game
arts.sum: Luis Enrique proved that point with a bold decision to drop forward Ousmane Dembélé on disciplinary grounds for a big Champions League game at Arsenal. Young players such as 22-year-old Bradley Barcola, who has 18 goals this season, and 19-year-old Désiré Doué became symbols of a new-look PSG less dependant on big names.
